case.title: COON RAPIDS NAT BANK v. LEE

opinion.h1: COON RAPIDS NAT BANK v. LEE, 239 U.S. 659 (1916)
opinion.h2: COON RAPIDS NATIONAL BANK et al., Plaintiffs in Error, v. MAGGIE I. LEE,1 Executrix, etc. No. 796.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: No appearance for plaintiffs in error.
Mr. A. B. Cummins and Mr. O. M. Brockett for defendant in error.
Docketed and dismissed with costs, pursuant to the Ninth Rule.

f.p: Death of Anderville Lee suggested, and appearance of Maggie I. Lee, as party in error herein, filed and entered on January 10, 1916.
